ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and structure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., CNN, LSTM) */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Input shape of the model */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* Output shape of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "training_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "compute_resources" TEXT /* Compute resources used for training (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Total training time in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during training in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "training_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run associated with the metrics */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the training run */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Loss on the training dataset */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Loss on the testing dataset */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy on the training dataset */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy on the testing dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score on the testing dataset */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision on the testing dataset */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall on the testing dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_training_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("training_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created or uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in training */,
  "num_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used in training (e.g., cross-entropy, mean squared error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model or dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training configuration used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES training_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment associated with the performance metrics */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the deployed model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the deployed model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the deployed model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the deployed model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES model_deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
